context: Tests whether the agent correctly instruments an existing App Builder action using @adobe/aio-lib-telemetry, applying the right signal types for each observability goal, using named functions, placing metric definitions correctly, and following implementation patterns.

checklist.name: instrument() for I/O functions
checklist.description: Uses `instrument()` to wrap at least one I/O function (storeEvents and/or notifyDownstream) to create child spans — not for pure computation functions like average() or validateEvent()

checklist.name: Named functions preferred
checklist.description: Where instrument() is applied, named functions are used (e.g., `instrument(function storeEvents(...) {...})`) rather than arrow functions without spanName

checklist.name: Arrow functions have spanName
checklist.description: Any arrow function passed to instrument() explicitly provides `spanConfig: { spanName: '...' }` — not relying on anonymous function name inference

checklist.name: defineMetrics at module level
checklist.description: Custom metrics are defined using `defineMetrics((meter) => ({ ... }))` at module level (outside the handler function), not inside the handler or any per-invocation function

checklist.name: Counter metric for events
checklist.description: Defines a counter metric (using meter.createCounter) to track events processed or events rejected over time

checklist.name: Metric naming conventions
checklist.description: Metric names use dot-separated namespaces and snake_case, and include units in the suffix when relevant (e.g., `ingest.events_processed`, `ingest.events_rejected`, `ingest.payload_size_bytes`)

checklist.name: Does NOT instrument pure computation
checklist.description: Does NOT apply instrument() to pure computation helpers like `validateEvent()`, `transformEvent()`, or `average()` that perform no I/O

checklist.name: Span attributes for context
checklist.description: Adds span attributes (e.g., received count, stored count, invalid count) to the root or child spans — not putting high-cardinality data in metric labels

checklist.name: Valid import paths only
checklist.description: Any new imports added use only valid paths: `@adobe/aio-lib-telemetry`, `@adobe/aio-lib-telemetry/otel`, or `@adobe/aio-lib-telemetry/integrations`

checklist.name: No PII in telemetry
checklist.description: Does NOT include sensitive data such as tokens, bearer credentials, or user-identifiable information in span attributes, events, or metric labels

checklist.name: instrument() within entrypoint context
checklist.description: All instrument() calls are used within the handler that is wrapped by instrumentEntrypoint — not at module load time or outside the instrumented call chain
